keySetup.title: Setap key bilong dispela divais
keySetup.description: Dispela divais i no gat praivet key bilong yu yet. Impot password-protekten backup, o mekim nupela keypair (bai yu inap ridim nupela mesej nau).
keySetup.imported: Praivet key i go insait long dispela divais. Yu inap ridim olpela mesej nau.
keySetup.enterPassword: Givim password bilong akant bilong yu bai mipela ken mekim sekur backup bilong key.

auth.headline: Sekur mesej bilong eni man, long eni hap
auth.description: End-to-end enkripsen, tanim tok long 100+ tokples, mesej i stap liklik taim, na voes/vidio kol.

feature.encryption: End-to-end enkripsen i stap olsem default
feature.translation: Smat tanim tok insait long mesej
feature.disappearing: Mesej i stap liklik taim & rid risit
feature.privacy: Praives fos. Data bilong yu, yu yet i kontrolim.
feature.translate: Smat tanim tok insait long mesej

hero.line1: Sekur mesej bilong eni man, long eni hap — wantaim
hero.sub: Kisim fri sekur fon namba bilong kol na rait long olgeta hap long Wi-Fi o data. Injoim end-to-end enkripsen, mesej i stap liklik taim, na HD voes/vidio kol — wantaim ol tul insait long app bilong helpim yu stap sindaun wantaim ol narapela long narapela kantri.
hero.freeNote: Besik kol na rait i fri. Advans AI na premium fita i nidim apgreid.

feat.translate: Brekim langguij beria long toktok bilong yu
feat.disappear: Mesej i stap liklik taim & rid risit
feat.privacy: Praives fos. Data bilong yu, yu yet i kontrolim.

auth.desktopTip: Yu stap long desktop? Skan wantaim fon bilong yu ken kisim app.
auth.scanHelper: Yu stap long desktop? Skan wantaim fon bilong yu ken kisim app.
auth.subhead: Praivet, enkripted, na tanim tok mesej — kwik taim.
auth.tip: Tip: Yusim sem akant long web na mobail. Mesej bilong yu i stap sinkronais.
auth.scanHint: Skan bilong daunloud app o opim long brawsa bilong yu.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimam 6 leta. Yusim strong na wanpela paswod.
registration.smsConsent: Taim yu mekim nupela akant, yu orait long kisim SMS notis bilong Chatforia akant bilong yu (olsem mesej long ol narapela yusa). Mesenj na data ret i inap kamap. Yu inap stopim eni taim long Setings.

auth.addRecipient: Putim wanpela risipent antap bilong stat…
auth.oneRecipient: Plis givim wanpela risipent tasol nau.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Givim nem bilong seved kontak o fon namba.
auth.sendFailed: Send i no go. Lukim konsol bilong detels.

home.title: Hom
home.addRecipient: Putim wanpela man kisim antap bilong stat…

refund.title: Polisi bilong Bekim Mani
refund.intro: Long Chatforia, mipela wok long givim gutpela sevis long olgeta yusa. Dispela polisi i tok klia long wanem taim yumi inap bekim mani.

subscriptions.title: Sabsripson
subscriptions.body: Ol sabsripson i save kisim pe long pas taim na i go het oltaim. Yu inap stopim en long wanem taim yu laik long account settings o long platform yu bin baim long en.

eligibility.title: Ol Rul bilong Bekim Mani
eligibility.body: Mipela inap bekim mani sapos i gat tupela pe nating, rong long pe, o sapos i gat teknikal hevi i stopim yu long yusim ol peid fisa. Mipela save lukluk long olgeta askim wanwan.

nonRefundable.title: Ol Samting Mipela No Save Bekim
nonRefundable.body: Planti taim mipela no save bekim mani long taim yu no yusim, hap sabsripson, o sapos yu no stopim bipo taim bilong nupela pe i kamap.

thirdParty.title: Baia Long Narapela Platform
thirdParty.body: Sapos yu bin baim long ol narapela platform olsem Apple App Store, yu mas askim bekim mani stret long ol yet.

contact.title: Kontak
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

about.title: Long Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia em wanpela nupela messaging platform bilong mekim toktok i stap seif na long planti tokples...

about.privacyDesc: Strongpela encryption na ol praivesi settings yu inap kontrolim

whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging i go het long senis wantaim ol nupela fisa...
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia i wokim dispela ol tingting...

global.title: Bihain Taim bilong Global Toktok

global.realtimeDesc: Hariap em i wanpela bikpela samting...

profile.disappearingMessages: Wokim mesej i stap liklik taim
profile.saveError: Rong: I no inap sev setings
profile.noPrivateKey: Nogat praivet key long dispela divais bilong ekspot.
profile.setBackupPassword: Setim paswod bilong enkriptim backup bilong yu:
profile.importSuccess: Praivet key i go insait long dispela divais.
profile.importFailed: I no inap impot key (paswod rong o fail i bagarap).
profile.keysRotated: Nupela key pair i mekim pinis na pablik key i go antap.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Praivet key bilong yu i no lusim dispela divais. Ekspot password-protekten kopi bilong kisim bek long narapela divais.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Yu stap long Fri — yusim Sun/Mun opsen bilong daunbilo. Apgreid bilong kisim moa tema.
profile.backupDesc: Mekim bekap bilong enkripsen key bilong yu bilong kisim bek mesej long narapela divais.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Blurim taim app i no lukim
profile.planLoadFailed: I no inap lodim plan bilong yu.
profile.freePlanCopy: Yu stap long fri plan. Apgreid bilong kisim moa fita olsem bekaps, moa namba, na advans praivesi.
profile.portalOpenFailed: I no inap opim bilim portal. Plis traim gen.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Tokim mi sapos mesej bilong mi i kopi
profile.followHint: Stori bilong ol i stap long Folaing fid bilong yu sapos ol i postim wantaim ol Fola (o Pablik).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Samting i bagarap long dispela seksen.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Forwardim kam kol na rait long tru fon o imel bilong yu. Kol/rait i go aut inap sopim Chatforia namba bilong yu.
profile.errSmsDest: Lusim wanpela goi (fon o imel) tasol.
profile.errQuietHours: Kwaiet auas i mas stap namel long 0 na 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Mipela i stapim tasol age rang (nogat stret de bilong bon). Dispela i yusim bilong mekim Random Toktok i stret.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Yusim age bilong matsim long Random Toktok
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Taim i stap on, mipela i traim bilong painim ol man long stret age rang.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Ol tinaga i stap wantaim ol tinaga tasol. Ol bikpela i no inap matsim wantaim tinaga.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Bilong sefti, ol akant long 13–17 age rang inap matsim wantaim narapela 13–17 akant tasol long Random Toktok.
profile.foriaRemember: Lusim Ria i tingim samting yu tokim em
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Taim dispela i on, Foria inap yusim olpela Random Toktok bilong yu (wantaim yu tasol) bilong mekim toktok i go gut. Yu inap stopim eni taim.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Lusim emti bilong kipim olgeta taim
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Yusim taim audio greeting bilong yu i no stap.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Voismeil greeting i ap pinis gut
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Apim voismeil greeting i no go
profile.voicemailNote: Voismeil long Chatforia namba bilong yu i stap long Voismeil inboks bilong yu. Yu inap wokim transkrip na forwarding long plan i inap.
profile.portHint: Yu laik kipim namba bilong yu? Yu inap potim em i go insait long Chatforia Wireless.

port.heading: Potim namba bilong yu

port.success: Pot rikwest i go pinis! Mipela bai tokim yu.

status.subheading: Lukim stetus bilong pot rikwest bilong yu.
status.loadError: I no inap lodim pot rikwest.

wireless.dataLow: Data bilong yu i stap liklik nau.
wireless.exhausted: Data bilong yu i pinis. Baim nupela pak bilong yusim mobail data.

error.load: I no inap lodim famili detels.
error.invite: I no inap mekim invait. Mekim yu yet i famili ona na traim gen.
error.checkout: I no inap statim sekaut bilong Famili plan. Plis traim gen.

billing.myPlanError: I no inap lodim plan bilong yu.

billing.portalError: I no inap opim bilim portal nau.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Yu inap managim o kansel sabskripsen long bilim portal, o kansel kwik daunbilo.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Yu sure yu laik kansel plan bilong yu kwik taim? Dispela i no inap kam bek.
billing.cancelNowError: I no inap kansel plan bilong yu nau. Plis traim gen o yusim Managim bilim.

none.title: Nogat famili setap yet
none.body: Bilong mekim Chatforia Famili na sered data pul, statim Famili plan.

data.heading: Sered data pul
data.caption: Ol memba i sered dispela pul. Mipela bai tokim yu taim yu klos long limit.

invite.title: Invaitim nupela memba
invite.body: Sendim imel o link bilong invaitim wanpela i go insait long sered famili data pul bilong yu.
invite.expiryHint: Dispela link i stap inap liklik dei. Yu inap mekim nupela eni taim.

join.title: Joinim famili
join.body: Yu kisim invait bilong joinim Chatforia Famili na sered data pul bilong ol.
join.success: Yu joinim dispela famili pinis. Yu sered data pul bilong ol nau.
join.error: I no inap putim yu insait long famili. Invait i no stret o i pinis.

upgrade.title: Apgreid
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Stat wantaim fri plan i gat ads. Go nogat ads wantaim Plus, o kisim ful powa fita wantaim Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Lusim wanpela app plan, putim data pak bilong yu, o sered data wantaim famili — olgeta long wanpela ples.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Stat wantaim fri plan i gat ads. Go nogat ads wantaim Plus, o kisim ful powa fita wantaim Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Putim global eSIM data bai Chatforia i wok yet taim yu stap longwe long Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Mekim sered data pul bilong famili na managim yusim bilong olgeta long wanpela ples.

scheduleBanner.title: Sabskripsen i pinis
scheduleBanner.body: Bai yu go bek long Fri long

free.title: Fri
free.desc: Statim mesej fri. Gutpela sapos yu laik traiim Chatforia tasol.

features.chat: Real-taim 1:1 na grup toktok, plus voes na video kol
features.media: Serim piksa, voes mesej, na sot video
features.ai: AI smat rispong na kwik tanim tok (fair yus)
features.disappearing: Mesej i stap liklik taim na besik praivesi kontrol
features.ads: Fri oltaim wantaim ads insait long app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Olgeta besik, nogat ads. Gutpela bilong de-de mesej na kol.

features.forwarding: Forwardim kol na rait long tru fon namba bilong yu
features.history: Longpela mesej histori (i go inap 6 mun)

plus.ctaPublic: Kisim Plus — go long log in

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Munli)
premiumMonthly.desc: Ful Chatforia: AI strong tul, kastom, na prioreti sopta.

features.themes: Kisim ol premium kala tema na app kastom
features.ai: Premium tasol AI powa tul bilong rait gen, smat rispong, na samari
features.support: Prioreti sopta taim yu nidim tru

premiumMonthly.ctaPublic: Kisim Premium — go long log in

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Yia)
premiumAnnual.desc: Sevim moa taim i bilim yia — wantaim ekstra kala tema, AI tul, na prioreti sopta.

features.allPremium: Olgeta long Premium Munli — wantaim ekstra kala tema
features.bestFor: Gutpela bilong strong yusa, wok longwe, na hevi travel

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Sevim 30% wantaim yia — go long log in
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Bilim stret. Kansel eni taim. Nogat hait fii.

marketing.plusDesc: Namba wan pris bilong nogat ads.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Ful fita, ringtone, na AI strong tul.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Sevim moa taim i bilim yia.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Bilim stret. Kansel eni taim. Nogat hait fii.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobail (eSIM data pak)
mobile.subtitle: Putim global data bilong Chatforia i wok yet taim yu stap longwe long Wi-Fi. Pris i senisim wantaim kantri na kareni bilong yu.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Lusim wanpela global data pak bai Chatforia i wok yet taim yu travel o stap longwe long Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Mipela i no selim data pak i stap andanit long 3 GB.

features.throttle: Spid inap go slou bihain long hevi yus

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data pak i nidim eSIM-kompatibol na op divais. I stap wantaim fon model, karia, na kantri. Kova na spid i senisim wantaim ples.

small.title: Stat pak
small.desc: I gat 3 GB hait-spid data — gutpela bilong liklik mesej na liklik kol.
small.bestFor: Sot trip, liklik mesej, na liklik kol

medium.title: Travel pak
medium.desc: I gat 5 GB hait-spid data bilong trip, wokabaut, na regul VoIP kol.
medium.bestFor: Wikend trip, regul VoIP kol, na map

large.title: Powa pak
large.desc: I gat 10 GB hait-spid data bilong hevi toktok, kol, na video long Chatforia netwok.
large.bestFor: Hevi toktok, kol, video, na hotspot yus
large.aria: Baim Powa yusa eSIM data pak

compare.title: Kompa eSIM data pak
compare.disclaimer: Tru data yus i depend long hau yu yusim Chatforia (voes, video, media, na narapela app long fon bilong yu).

family.title: Chatforia Famili (sered data)
family.subtitle: Sered wanpela data pul long famili bilong yu. Wanpela bilim, planti Chatforia akant, global kova.

small.title: Famili Smol
small.desc: I gat 20 GB sered hait-spid data — gutpela bilong 2–3 liklik yusa.

medium.title: Famili Midium
medium.desc: I gat 40 GB sered hait-spid data — gutpela bilong 3–5 aktiv memba.

large.title: Famili Bikpela
large.desc: I gat 80 GB sered hait-spid data — bilong strong famili we i stap oltaim online.

feature.shared: Sered data pul bilong famili bilong yu
feature.fairUse: I stap long fair-yus polisi na lokal limit

family.disclaimer: Famili pak i mekim o top ap sered data pul. Yu inap invaitim o rausim memba eni taim.
family.footnote: Famili pak i sered wanpela data pul long link Chatforia akant. I stap wantaim kantri na lokal lo.

why.title: Wai ol man i senisim i go long Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia i givim tru fon namba, smat tanim tok, na kwik rot bilong go nogat ads taim yu redi.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Liklik ads long Fri, simpol Plus apgreid taim yu redi, na Premium tul TextNow i no gat.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Moden app, global-fos design, na tanim tok insait long app — nogat olpela kol forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat app
messengers.body: Rait tru fon namba — nogat tasol app yusa — wantaim AI na stetus. Gutpela sapos yu kam long app olsem TextFree o TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Kompa i bes long pablik infomesen na inap senisim. Narapela fri rait app olsem TextFree o TextMe i olsem TextNow tasol.

free.a: Yes. Fri plan i gat Chatforia namba, kol, na mesej wantaim ads. Yu inap stap long Fri longtaim, o apgreid bilong rausim ads na kisim moa fita.

plusPremium.q: Wanem i diferens namel long Plus na Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus i rausim ads na mekim mesej histori i longpela — gutpela bilong de-de yus. Premium i putim ekstra kastom, AI tul bilong rait gen na rispong, na prioreti sopta bilong hevi yusa.

esim.q: Wanem hap eSIM data pak i wok?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobail i yusim global eSIM kova. I stap wantaim kantri na divais bilong yu. Yu inap lukim ol opsen taim yu statim insait long app.

cancel.q: Inap mi kansel o senisim plan eni taim?
cancel.a: Yes. Yu inap managim o kansel sabskripsen long bilim pej insait long app. Senis i kamap long pinis bilong bilim taim bilong yu nau.

family.a: Famili pak i mekim wanpela sered data pul long planti Chatforia akant. Wanpela man i peim bilim, na yu inap invaitim o rausim memba na setim limit bilong wanwan.

gettingStarted.title: Statim
gettingStarted.subtitle: Nupela long Chatforia? Dispela kwik stat i sopim ol besik samting bai yu inap wok gut kwik taim.

alert.text: Dispela gaide bai kamap bikpela taim mipela i lusim nupela fita. Sapos samting i missin, tokim mipela long

section2.title: 2) Statim mesej
section2.item1: Mekim DM o Grup na sendim nambawan mesej bilong yu.
section2.item2: Yusim kwik tanim tok bilong toktok long 100+ tokples.
section2.item3: Traim mesej i stap liklik taim na rid risit long Profil → Praivesi.

section3.title: 3) Go moa
section3.item1: Yu inap apgreid long peim plan eni taim insait long app.
section3.item2: Taim yu sain in pinis, yu inap linkim moa divais na setap enkripted bekaps long Setings insait long app.

account.q: Hau mi mekim o kisim bek akant bilong mi?
account.a: Daunloud app o yusim web, klik “Mekim nupela akant”, verifaim imel/fon. Bilong kisim bek, yusim “Yupela lusim paswod”.

privacy.a: Yes. Mesej na kol i end-to-end enkripted olsem default. Yu tasol na risipent inap ridim.

translate.q: Hau kwik tanim tok i wok?
translate.a: Wokim “Auto-tanim” long Setings → Lukluk & Tokples. Mipela i tanim long divais taim i inap, o long sekur API wantaim liklik metadata.

contact.a: Tokim mipela long support@chatforia.com. Putim skrinshot na vesin bilong app bilong yu.

contact.title: Kontakt Mipela
contact.successMsg: Tenkyu — tim bilong mipela bai raitim bek long imel.
contact.errorSend: I no inap sendim. Plis imel support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Dispela Praivesi Polisi i tokim hau Chatforia (“mipela”) i kisim, yusim, na sered infomesen taim yu yusim app na sevis bilong mipela. Mipela i mekim Chatforia bilong minimam data mipela inap lukim.

infoWeCollect.title: Infomesen mipela i kisim
infoWeCollect.account: Akant infomesen (olsem imel/fon) bilong mekim na sekurim akant bilong yu.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Enkripted tok (mesej/kol) i end-to-end enkripted; mipela i no inap ridim.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostik/yusim olsem krash log, kain divais, o liklik analitik bilong mekim app i betta.

sms.title: Mobail fon namba na SMS
sms.body: Sapos yu givim mobail fon namba, mipela i yusim bilong wokim fita olsem verifai akant, log in alat, na yusa long yusa mesej long SMS taim i inap. Mipela inap sendim transaksen SMS bilong akant na aktiviti long Chatforia. Yu inap stopim SMS eni taim long raitim “STOP” o senisim notis setings long app. Mipela i no selim fon namba bilong yu o yusim bilong narapela maketing.

howWeUse.title: Hau mipela i yusim infomesen
howWeUse.provide: Givim na sekurim sevis (aut, spam/abius deteksen).
howWeUse.improve: Mekim fita i betta (tanim tok kwoliti, strong).

sharing.title: Sered
sharing.body: Mipela i no selim pesonal data. Mipela inap sered liklik data wantaim prosesa (olsem pus notis, analitik) long stret kontrak.

rights.title: Rait bilong yu
rights.body: Depend long ples bilong yu (olsem GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), yu inap askim akses, korrekten, rausim, o stopim sam processing. Kontakt: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data i stap longtaim & sekuriti
retention.body: Mipela i kipim tasol samting mipela nidim bilong ronim sevis na yusim strong sekuriti. E2E tok i no inap opim long mipela.

children.title: Pikinini
children.body: Chatforia i no bilong pikinini andanit long 13 (o olsem lo bilong kantri bilong yu i tok).

changes.title: Senis
changes.body: Mipela bai putim nupela hia na senisim “Las apdet” de.

contact.title: Kontakt
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Taim yu yusim Chatforia yu orait long dispela Toms. Sapos yu no orait, no yusim sevis.

accounts.title: Akant
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Givim stret infomesen na kipim paswod sekur.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Yu yet i responsibol long ol samting long akant bilong yu.

acceptableUse.title: Gutpela yus
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Nogat rong, abius, o brukim lo; nogat spam o otomatik abius.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Mipela inap stopim o rausim akant bilong brukim lo.

sms.title: SMS tok
sms.body: Sapos yu givim mobail fon namba, yu orait long Chatforia i sendim SMS bilong akant na yusim sevis, olsem log in alat, sekuriti notis, na mesej bilong toktok yu statim o joinim. Mipela i no yusim SMS bilong maketing sapos yu no givim orait stret. Nomal mesenj na data ret inap kamap. Yu inap stopim SMS eni taim long raitim “STOP” o senisim notis setings long app.

yourContent.title: Tok bilong yu
yourContent.body: Yu yet i gat rait long tok bilong yu. Yu givim mipela rait mipela nidim bilong ronim sevis (olsem ronim, stapim, tanim tok).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer & liability
disclaimer.body: Sevis i stap olsem “olsem i stap” nogat garanti. Long ful strong bilong lo, Chatforia i no responsibol long indirekt o narapela rong.

changes.title: Senis
changes.body: Mipela inap apdetim toms; sapos yu yusim bihain long senis, yu orait.

contact.title: Kontakt
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Nogat Selim o Sered Pesonal Infomesen bilong mi
doNotSell.body: Chatforia i no selim pesonal infomesen. Ol California manmeri inap putim rikwest long CPRA long baten daunbilo.

cookies.title: Kuki Setings
cookies.body: Chatforia i yusim liklik kuki (olsem sesen, sekuriti). Mipela i no yusim thad pati ads kuki. Managim kuki long brawsa setings bilong yu.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: I no inap lodim fon namba stetus.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Nogat namba i givim. Lusim wanpela long eria kod bilong statim rait.

startChatModal.title: Statim toktok
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Raitim nem, yusaneim, fon, o imel…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Raitim yusaneim o fon na klik Lukim.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Fon/imel i stap bihain yu sevim olsem kontak.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: I no inap statim toktok wantaim ol lusim.

sounds.freeNotice: Yu stap long Fri — premium saun i sopim tasol i lok. Apgreid bilong kisim olgeta.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Dispela fita i nidim Premium plan.

aiSettings.title: AI Setings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Kontrolim tanim tok, smat rispong, na ForiaBot auto-rispong.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Sendim las liklik mesej (klinim) long AI bilong givim kwik rispong.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Maskim strong tok long AI toksave
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Taim i on, AI rispong bai maskim strong tok
aiSettings.saveFailed: I no inap sev AI setings

accessibilitySettings.title: Istap bilong helpim & Alat
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Opsen bilong mekim Chatforia i isi yusim nogat saun.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Stat long normal sais. Mekim bikpela sapos yu laikim bikpela leta long istap setings.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alat bilong mesej & kol
Sopim baner na titel blaink bai yu no missim samting.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibreit long nupela mesej (taim i inap)
Mekim divais i vibreit wantaim notis.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash skrin long kam kol
Liklik strong lait taim kol i ring.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Putim transkrip long audio mesej yu kisim.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Sopim baner na titel blaink bai yu no missim samting.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Vibreit long nupela mesej (taim i inap)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Mekim divais i vibreit wantaim notis.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Liklik strong lait taim kol i ring.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Stapim tasol saifa tekst long seva. I stopim AI/Tanim tok na moderesen lukluk.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Lukim long alias, nem, yusaneim, o fon
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Serim invait link bilong statim toktok kwik.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Stap sindaun wantaim long go wantaim Chatforia bilong iOS na Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Mesej bilong yu i sinkronais long web na mobail.

randomChat.title: Random Toktok
randomChat.description: Painim nupela manmeri kwik taim. Mipela bai matsim yu na opim temp toktok rum. Toktok nating pastaim. Putim fren bihain sapos yu laikim.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Mipela i stapim tasol age rang (nogat stret de bilong bon). Dispela i yusim bilong mekim Random Toktok i stret. Bilong matsim wantaim manmeri (nogat tasol RiaBot), setim age rang long Setings → Age & Random Toktok.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Setim age rang bilong yu long Profil → Age & Random Toktok bilong matsim wantaim manmeri.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Bilong matsim wantaim manmeri (nogat tasol RiaBot), setim age rang long Setings → Age & Random Toktok.
randomChat.subtitle: Painim nupela manmeri kwik taim, o lusim bilong toktok wantaim Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Setim age rang bilong yu long Profil → Age & Random Toktok bilong matsim wantaim manmeri.

ria.intro: Hai 👋 Mi Ria. Wanem i stap long het bilong yu?

greetings.long1: Hai {{name}} 👋 Mi stap. Wanem i stap long het bilong yu?
greetings.long2: Hai {{name}} 😊 Wanem yu laik toktok long em nau?
greetings.long3: Hai {{name}}!! Mi harim — wanem i stap?
greetings.long4: Gutpela lukim yu, {{name}} 👋 Wanem i stap long het bilong yu nau?
greetings.long5: Hai {{name}} 😊 Yu laik tokaut, askim, o toktok tasol?
greetings.long6: Hai {{name}}!! Mi gat taim — wanem yu laik toktok long em?
greetings.short1: Hai {{name}}, mi stap yet. Wanem i stap?
greetings.short2: Welkam bek {{name}} 👋 Yu laik putim moa samting?
greetings.short3: Yu kam bek gen, {{name}}? 😊 Tokim mi wanem i stap long het bilong yu.
greetings.short4: Hai {{name}} 👋 Yu redi bilong statim we mipela i lusim?
greetings.short6: Oh hai {{name}}!! Yu gat nupela samting long het?

login.title: Go long Chatforia
login.subtitleReturning: Log in long Chatforia akant bilong yu
login.subtitle: Log in long Chatforia akant bilong yu
login.googleUnavailable: Google sain in i no stap
login.appleUnavailable: Apple sain in i no stap

forgot.title: Yupela lusim paswod
forgot.helper: Givim imel yu yusim bilong mekim Chatforia akant bai mipela sendim sekur link bilong riset paswod.
forgot.genericError: I no inap wokim rikwest. Plis traim gen liklik taim.
forgot.sentHelper: Sapos akant i stap wantaim dispela imel, mipela i sendim paswod riset link. I inap kisim liklik taim. Plis lukim spam o promosen folda.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sain-on i no stap nau. Yusim yusaneim & paswod tasol.

error.unprocessable: Rikwest i rong. Lukim yusaneim/imel na paswod bilong yu.
error.deviceLimit: Divais limit i kamap long Fri plan. Log aut long narapela divais o apgreid long Premium bilong linkim moa divais.
error.premiumRequired: Dispela samting i nidim Premium plan.

dialer.title: Kol
dialer.subtitle: Kipad & nupela. (Sapos yu no yusim PSTN, statim kol long toktok heda.)

video.title: Video
video.roomsDesc: Plantiman video yusim sered rum nem.
video.deeplinkTip: Tip: yu inap dip link stret long /video?room=rum-nem.

direct.title: Direkt Video
direct.subtitle: Statim 1:1 video kol yusim fon namba o Chatforia yusaneim.
direct.tipInvite: Tip: Putim namba na kol nogat putim kontak. Mipela bai invaitim ol nogat yusa long link.

rooms.title: Rum
rooms.subtitle: Mekim rum o joinim wanpela i stap long raitim sem nem.
rooms.desc: Plantiman video yusim sered rum nem.
rooms.tip: Tip: serim dispela nem long ol narapela, o dip link long /video?room=rum-nem.

phoneWarning.title: Namba bilong yu i klos liklik taim
phoneWarning.body: Namba bilong yu {{number}} bai lusim long {{date}} sapos yu no mekim gen.

support.heading: Hau mipela inap helpim yu?
support.contactIntro: Mipela bai imelim yu. Putim detels bilong helpim mipela painim rong.
support.sent: Mesej i go pinis. Mipela bai raitim bek long imel.
support.sendError: I no inap sendim. Imel support@chatforia.com tasol.

encryptionRecovery.title: Managim Enkripsen
encryptionRecovery.description: Mekim bekap, kisim bek, opim, o riset enkripsen key bilong yu.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Dispela brawsa i no inap opim enkripted mesej bilong yu nau. Kisim bek, opim, o riset key bilong yu bilong gohet.

unlockPasscode.label: Opim paswod (divais nau)
unlockPasscode.description: Yusim bilong opim key bilong yu long divais pastaim ekspot

restoreBackupPassword.label: Bekap paswod
restoreBackupPassword.description: Paswod yu mekim taim yu mekim bekap key long iPhone

resetLocalPasscode.label: Nupela lokal paswod
resetLocalPasscode.description: Nidim pastaim riset bai nupela key i protekt long dispela divais

messages.backupCreated: Key bekap i mekim pinis na daunloud.
messages.keyRestored: Key i kam bek long akant bekap.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Key kisim bek i no pinis o rong bilong dispela akant
errors.noBackup: Nogat enkripted bekap i stap bilong dispela akant
errors.missingPublicKey: Bekap i no gat pablik key
errors.noServerPublicKey: Dispela akant i no sopim seva pablik key nau
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Seva bekap i no matim enkripsen key bilong akant nau
errors.resetIncomplete: Enkripsen riset i no pinis stret

confirm.reset:
Riset enkripsen bilong dispela akant?

Olpela enkripted mesej inap no inap ridim sapos yu no kisim bek orijinal key bihain.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Dispela i mekim nupela enkripsen key bilong akant bilong yu. Olpela enkripted mesej inap no inap ridim sapos yu no kisim bek orijinal key bihain.

press.title: Pres
press.contactLine: Bilong media rikwest, tokim mipela long
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia i sekur mesenja we i mekim tanim tok kwik. Mesej i end-to-end enkripted olsem default, na tanim tok insait long app i inap long 100+ tokples kwik taim. Yusa inap wokim mesej i stap liklik taim, rid risit i opsen, na sinkronais long divais. I stap long iOS, Android, na web.
press.assetsSubtitle: Logo, skrinshot, na piksa bilong produk.
press.scanTip: Yu stap long desktop? Skan wantaim fon bilong yu ken kisim app.

careers.title: Wok
careers.intro: Mipela i liklik tim bilong mekim Chatforia — sekur, global mesenja i kamap long web, iOS, na Android. Sapos yu laik praivesi, enkripsen, na gutpela yusa lukluk, mipela laik harim long yu.
careers.openRoles: Op wok bilong statim: Lid Ful-stak Enjinia, Bekend Enjinia (Node.js), Fronten/Web Enjinia (React), Mobail Enjinia (iOS), Mobail Enjinia (Android), DevOps/SRE, Sekuriti & Enkripsen Enjinia, Telekom Enjinia (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Hau bilong putim: Yusim baten daunbilo bilong imel risume na link bilong yu.
careers.whyBullets:
• Helpim mekim bes bilong nupela global mesenja.
• Sendim nupela samting long web, iOS, na Android.
• Wok stret wantaim ona long desain na produk.
• Lukautim bikpela pat bilong app: mesej, voes, video, enkripsen, telekom, AI.
• Join long stat — pastaim planti yusa i kamap.

about.title: Abaot Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia i sekur, planti tokples mesenja wantaim end-to-end enkripsen, kwik tanim tok, na voes/video kol. Mision bilong mipela i simpol: helpim ol man i stap wantaim — sekur, praivet, na long planti tokples.

values.control: Kontrol: Mesej i stap liklik taim & rid risit i opsen.
values.privacy_aria: Praives fos: E2E enkripsen olsem default.
values.control_aria: Kontrol: Mesej i stap liklik taim na rid risit i opsen.

about.howDescription: Mesej i enkript long divais bilong yu pastaim i go aut. Tanim tok, bekaps, na divais sink i mekim bilong minimam wanem seva inap lukim.

advertise.title: Advertis wantaim Chatforia
advertise.description: Painim ol yusa we i toktok planti wantaim gutpela, sekur ples. Mipela i givim baner long gutpela ples, sponsor, na haus promo. Premium yusa i no lukim ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Mipela i givim tu long Google AdSense. Yu inap target Chatforia wantaim pablihsa ID {{pubId}}, o yusim form daunbilo bilong direkt sponsor.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Mipela i givim liklik long Google AdSense. Direkt sponsor i stap — yusim form daunbilo.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Mipela i pinisim ad stok nau. Tokim mipela long kampen bilong yu bai mipela givim gutpela ples.

why.highSession: Plantit taim i stap long toktok UI
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsor momant (olsem “Statim Toktok” modal) i stap
why.deals: Direkt o program long AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Tenkyu! Rikwest bilong yu i go pinis. Mipela bai tokim yu kwik taim.
form.missingRequired: Plis pulim nem, imel, na mesej.
